rows.label: tev001394_MSG0001
rows.name:
What a surprise to cross paths with you
here, [ST:playername ]. I hope you are doing well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001394_JNK0010
rows.name: Wonder about Rock

rows.label: tev001394_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Celica where Rock is.

rows.label: tev001394_JNK0020
rows.name: Wonder about Cat

rows.label: tev001394_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Celica if she has been petting the cat.

rows.label: tev001394_MSG0002
rows.name:
Rock is at work, doing his
part for this fair city. So I
am by myself for the moment.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001394_MSG0003
rows.name:
I was just exploring the commercial
district when I happened across this
cat and decided to follow it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001394_MSG0004
rows.name: That led me to here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001394_MSG0005
rows.name: I most certainly have![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001394_MSG0006
rows.name:
I was just exploring the commercial
district when I happened across this cat.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001394_MSG0007
rows.name:
It was so cute, I couldn't
help but follow it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001394_MSG0008
rows.name: That led me to here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001394_MSG0009
rows.name:
The craftsmanship on this
cat is truly exceptional.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001394_MSG0010
rows.name:
I couldn't believe it when Lin
told me that it was artificial.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001394_MSG0011
rows.name:
It appears completely real to the eye
as well as touch. And it's just as
moody and mischievous as a live cat![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001394_JNK0030
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev001394_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask if there were cats on Celica's world.

rows.label: tev001394_JNK0040
rows.name: Brag

rows.label: tev001394_SEL0041
rows.name: Boast that the cat is an exemplar of human ingenuity.

rows.label: tev001394_MSG0012
rows.name:
Yes. Just as we look slightly
different from humans, so did our
cats differ slightly from yours.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001394_MSG0013
rows.name:
It is certainly a stunning
and mysterious coincidence.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001394_MSG0014
rows.name:
Our worlds were so far
apart, as you know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001394_MSG0015
rows.name:
At yet, they were home to two species
as similar as yours and mine, as well
as two cute catlike species.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001394_MSG0016
rows.name: I suppose you're right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001394_MSG0017
rows.name:
How interesting that humans use their
technological prowess to re-create
the sensations of their homeworld.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001394_MSG0018
rows.name:
Yet I imagine the Growth use theirs to
create nothing but weapons of war.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001394_MSG0019
rows.name:
Perhaps this depth of spirit is the reason
humanity has managed to retain its sense of
humor and accept so many xenoforms so readily.[ST:wait ]
